title: Oman opens temporary Strait of Hormuz shipping routes, says no tolls will be charged

snapshot.title: Oman opens temporary Strait of Hormuz shipping routes, says no tolls will be charged
snapshot.description: Oman said it would keep the Strait of Hormuz open to shipping without imposing any tolls and had designated two temporary routes north and south of the existing shipping lane to facilitate the safe passage of vessels departing the region. In coordination with the International Maritime Organization, Oman established temporary maritime corridors to help ships leave the area
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Oman opens temporary Strait of Hormuz shipping routes, says no tolls will be charged | Arab News
